free_text: Elastic, inelastic scattering and fusion of the N-14+
Co-59 system at energies close to the Coulomb barrier.
REACTION lines are corrected.
Last checking has been done.
The targets were prepared by evaporation of metallic
cobalt, thickness of the order of 50 mug/cm**2.  Its
were deposited on 5-10 mug/cm**2 carbon backings.  A
thin layer of 2-mug/cm**2 of Au-197 was also deposited
on the target for calculation and normalization
purposes.
Optical model. The threshold anomaly.
Full and approximated coupled channel calculations.
8 silicon surface barrier detectors with
thickness of 100-150 mm.
*En-rsl-fw* the overall energy resolution.
The 8-ud pelletron accelerator.
The uncertainties in the differential cross section
data vary from 1% to 10% for the elastic scattering and
from 10% to 40% for the inelastic scattering.
.Data-point reader uncertainty.
.The uncertainty is shown by authors on figure
.By CAJAD.
Request for data, which has been sent
to J.C.Acquadro, has not any reply.
Data-point reader uncertainty.
